results.owner_or_reason: Not a coverage-index key, but hard-checked: mcp/breakdown E3.md cites 'ask cuts over to orvex-studio-ai (D-M7, ADR-0001)' and E3-S2.md says 'ADR-0001 governs'; mcp/plan.json stories E3-S2 (contracts-tag codegen + one deliberate /v1 regeneration, covers FR-M8/FR-M6/NFR-M4) and E3-S3 (ask -> orvex-studio-ai upstream: resolveAsk routing, K5 passthrough, no fallback, covers FR-M7) implement the ADR's two decisions. ADR title itself: 'MCP /v1 client regeneration + ask->ai upstream (contracts-pinned)' (slug lR3kpc0Ra2, draft) matches E3-S2/E3-S3 verbatim.
